alerts.title: Modified: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and CCCF established levels. New: Maximum levels (MLs) or guideline levels must be adhered to. Verification required via relevant Codex texts/standards.. Contaminants are substances not intentionally added to food. Codex MLs are established to protect human health and are kept as low as possible based on scientific evidence. The General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) is a key reference.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins, metals (arsenic, lead, mercury), radionuclides
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Maximum levels (MLs) must be adhered to. Verification required via relevant Codex texts/standards.. Codex has established MLs for specific contaminants like mycotoxins, metals (arsenic, lead, mercury), and radionuclides. These MLs ensure food does not contain contaminants at levels threatening human health.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification of GSO 9:2022 is required. This technical regulation covers general labelling requirements for pre-packaged food products, including information such as ingredients, nutritional facts, and origin.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements (for products making a Halal claim)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification of GSO 2055-1:2015 is required. This technical regulation outlines the general requirements for food to be considered Halal, which impacts ingredient selection and processing, and must be adhered to if a Halal claim is made on the label.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification of GSO 150-1:2013 is required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for various food products that must be declared on the label.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for prepackaged food stuffs must be verified within the full text of GSO 9:2022.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific general requirements for Halal food must be verified within the full text of GSO 2055-1:2015.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific mandatory expiration date requirements for food products must be verified within the full text of GSO 150-1:2013.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for various foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified within the full text of GSO 1016:2015.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited unless MHLW specifies as unlikely to cause harm. This implies a positive list system for additives.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food and Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must conform to MHLW established criteria for production, processing, use, cooking, preservation methods, and standards for ingredients. Verification against specific MHLW standards and criteria is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contamination or foreign substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited if likely to cause harm to human health.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, or pharmaceuticals for animals
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must not exceed MHLW-specified quantities. This refers to the Positive List System for Agricultural Chemical Residues.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited, unless MHLW specifies as unlikely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Imported livestock meat, etc. with diseases/abnormalities
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must have certificates from exporting country's governmental organization certifying freedom from specified diseases/abnormalities, or MHLW-specified electronic data.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited if contaminated or suspected to be so and likely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits for food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory. All food businesses offering food for sale in Singapore must comply.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Must be assessed for safety by SFA. Only food additives that have been assessed by SFA are permitted for use in food products sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition of import or sale. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of an additive not currently permitted.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits for contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory. All food businesses must comply with these limits and also with Regulatory Limits for Food Additives.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Not allowed to exceed regulatory limits. New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition of import or sale.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary drug residues (diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition of import or sale. Prohibited under Regulation 33 of the Food Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration on food labels. Applies only to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Mandatory declaration. New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. These are 10 of the 11 mandatory allergens requiring declaration.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Residues (as per ASEAN MRLs)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The updated ASEAN MRLs list must be consulted for maximum residue limits.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale must be verified.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from use in food. New: Prohibited from use in food. Listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189) as 'PROHIBITED' or 'PROHIBITED WITH EXCEPTIONS'.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 20. New: 20. This is an action level.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - Poisonous or deleterious substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool and referenced guidance/regulations. New: Must comply with tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, derived intervention levels, recommended maximum levels, and advisory levels. Tolerances and action levels are defined in 21 CFR parts 109 and 509. Users must refer to the transparency tool and linked guidance documents for specific contaminant-commodity pairs.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - 'Gluten-free' claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet FDA's defined standard for gluten content. Specific compliance requirements exist for fermented and hydrolyzed foods (final rule August 12, 2020).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Establishments must put written procedures in place to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate allergen labeling, as per 21 CFR part 117 (CGMP & PC rule). This rule establishes requirements for allergen preventive controls to prevent allergen cross-contact in manufacturing and packaging and to prevent undeclared allergens.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label. Identified as allergenic substances.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in one of two ways: 1) In parentheses following the ingredient name, or 2) Immediately after or next to the ingredient list in a 'contains' statement. The type of tree nut, species of fish, and species of Crustacean shellfish must also be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration is at or above the limit. Required due to adverse reactions in sensitive individuals.

alerts.title: Modified: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA database. New: Verification required via GSFA online database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the Preamble for interpreting the data. The database is regularly updated.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: Old: Follow Code of Practice for prevention and reduction. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required against Union list. The Union list of food additives and their conditions of use is in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Conditions of use and approval status must be verified. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required against Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. This regulation lays down food safety criteria and process hygiene criteria for specific foods.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Must comply with food safety criteria and process hygiene criteria. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella prevalence
alerts.details: Old: Must comply with special guarantees for trade. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification of GSO 150-2:2013 is required. This standard provides guidelines for optional shelf life periods for food products, which, if chosen, must be declared.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements, including allergen declaration and warnings
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Additive Limits - Permitted food additives and their maximum levels
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Food Additives Regulations.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Allergen List - Mandatory allergen declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Labelling and Display Regulations.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Labelling and Display Regulations.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Labelling Requirement - Specific labelling warnings
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Labelling and Display Regulations.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - All food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits and conditions for food additives in processed foods (including seasoning, snack food) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations for Pangan Olahan.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required for production, import, registration, and circulation provisions.. New: Verification required. Specific provisions for the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive in processed foods must be verified.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - All food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Mandatory allergen declaration requirements for processed foods (including seasoning, snack food) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations for Pangan Olahan.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Allergen List - All allergens
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - All chemical contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for chemical contaminants in processed foods (including seasoning, snack food) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations for Pangan Olahan.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - All contaminants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food categorization
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation categorizes foods, which is foundational for applying specific rules and labelling requirements for processed foods (including seasoning, snack food).

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Labelling warnings
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling warnings and requirements for processed foods (including seasoning, snack food) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations for Pangan Olahan.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - All labelling warnings/requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Categorization
alerts.details: Old: Verification required for food category definitions.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - All microbiological contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for microbiological contaminants in processed foods (including seasoning, snack food) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations for Pangan Olahan.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - All microbiological parameters
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt / Sodium
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for salt/sodium in processed foods (including seasoning, snack food) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations for Pangan Olahan.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against MHLW regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - General Food Additive Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required by consulting the Food Sanitation Law. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Specific Food Additive Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required by consulting 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act'. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against the Positive List System. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - General Contaminant Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required by consulting the Food Sanitation Law. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Specific Contaminant Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required by consulting 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act'. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Designated ingredients, etc. (MHLW-designated ingredients requiring special attention)
alerts.details: New: Business operators must notify authorities without delay if food containing designated ingredients causes or may cause harm. This implies a need to identify and potentially label such ingredients for safety.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Imported food and additives requiring certification of food sanitation management at production site
alerts.details: New: Must have certificates from exporting country's governmental organization.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Imported food and additives requiring measures to control particularly important processes
alerts.details: New: Must be produced/processed in MHLW-specified countries/regions/facilities that take those measures.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against official MHLW specifications and standards. These documents contain detailed limits and requirements.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses, Nutrition Labeling
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against MHLW regulations. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Microbiology Limits - General Microbiological Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required by consulting the Food Sanitation Law. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Microbiology Limits - Specific Microbiological Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required by consulting 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act'. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
